name: Darren Soto
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $874,118 for Darren Soto in U.S. House, FL-09. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
